title: stelis polystachya
intro: Stelis polystachya, also known as the stelis or polystachya orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is a terrestrial orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to prepare various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and are also used to support immune system health and to reduce stress and anxiety.
